C3_C5.C3_high_school_completion_requirement: High school diploma or equivalent is not required

C8A_entrance_exams_use_in_admission.C8F_test_policy_clarification: Starting FA 21 and until FA 26, HMC is ACT/SAT optional. We will consider ACT/SAT scores if submitted; students will not be at a disadvantage if they choose not to or cannot submit ACT/SAT scores.

institutional.notes: Institutional includes endowed scholarships, annual gifts and tuition funded grants; excludes athletic aid and tuition waivers.

_notes: B4 (Fall 2019) row D Pell cell showed '24 24' due to a layout artifact; recorded as 24. B5 row F total blank was computed as 4 (0+1+3) to align with row G totals.

B4 (Fall 2018) several cells displayed extra numbers (e.g., '49 49' in C subsidized, '40 10' and '121 21' in D); retained the correct first values (49, 40, 121) consistent with row sums; treated trailing numbers as artifacts.
B6 (Fall 2018) row B total 'о' interpreted as 0.
C1 enrollees by gender: 'another/unknown gender who enrolled' blank, but status table shows 2 full-time unknown; both values are preserved as-is per their respective tables.
C6 open admission policy options were not clearly marked; set to null where indeterminate.

C8 test policy checkbox glyphs were ambiguous in places; set explicit 'Not required but considered if submitted' for 'SAT or ACT' based on accompanying policy text; other cells left null where unclear.
C14 application closing date cells displayed '1 5' in both month and day; interpreted as Month=1, Day=5 (January 5) per CDS convention.
H2 row A 'Less than full-time Undergrad' cell showed '24 24'; recorded as 24 (single value).
H14 awarding criteria table contained garbled characters in some cells; only clearly indicated selections were recorded; ambiguous entries set to null.
